title: Cuneiform Tablet #0844: Old Assyrian Royal Inscription
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Royal Inscription document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records royal inscription matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
